events.title: One year after DOGE cuts, former federal workers find new roles
events.content: * Nonprofit Work for America is helping to place former federal workers in new roles in state and local government, after the largest reduction in the federal workforce in history. * In the last year, Work for America has placed nearly 200 job seekers in roles across the country and more than 12,800 job seekers have signed up for its Civic Match program. events.title: The fallout from DOGE's approach to government reform | Brookings
events.content: Hundreds of U.S. Postal Service workers rally against Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) actions against the institution in Washington on February 24, 2025. President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency has cut through the federal government aggressively, firing employees across agencies while testing legal boundaries. events.title: DOGE says it has saved $160 billion. Those cuts have cost ...
events.content: Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE, says it has saved $160 billion through its push to root out wasteful or fraudulent government spending. But that effort may also have come at a cost for taxpayers, with a new estimate from a nonpartisan research and advocacy group estimating that DOGE's actions will cost $135 billion this fiscal year. PSP's estimate is based on the $270 billion in annual compensation costs for the federal workforce, calculating the impact of DOGE's action

events.title: DOGE Fell Short on Spending Cuts: Now Congress Must Lead
events.content: # DOGE Fell Short on Spending Cuts: Now Congress Must Lead. While Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has rightfully drawn attention to some pretty silly and wasteful spending, it has overpromised and underdelivered on verifiable spending cuts. That’s precisely why Congress needs to take the reins and embrace big, bold spending cuts via reconciliation and presidentially initiated rescissions. Over the last few months, DOGE has had some modest successes, eliminating billions of

events.content: # Elon Musk's DOGE tally: The federal workforce is down while government spending is up.
